creator: matt@gsicomp.on.ca
text:
I get this occasionally on my 4.1-R and 4.2-S machines.  Using 'mount_cd9660
/dev/cd0c /dist' before or after running sysinstall never aborts with
errors.  I usually just end up mounting the CD before running sysinstall.

One thing - when it does give me the "Audio CD" error, it get a
"dscheck(#cd/2): negative b_blkno -16793264".

--
Matt Emmerton
